Adam K Kirchhoff <akirchhoff135014@gmail.com> wrote
  in <201007062040.o66Ke5nh066938@freefall.freebsd.org>:

ak> Subject: Re: ports/135486: print/acroread9 crashes after maybe 10 seconds of operation.
ak> Date: Tue, 6 Jul 2010 16:15:25 -0400
ak>
ak>  Any update on this bug?  I have various PDFs at work that are only viewable in
ak>  Acrobat Reader, but it's unusable here unless I downgrade to linux_base-fc4,
ak>  which is not a viable option.

 No progress so far.  Please use print/acroread8 instead.

-- Hiroki
